calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-06-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-06-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia Abalos.
Cindy Lee, Esq. for Plaintiff: James Myers, also present.
Defendant: Manuel Munoz, present in pro per.
Co-Defendant: Rosalinda Munoz, not present, but signed the Judgment Pursuant to Stipulation on Aug. 1, 2007 at the Settlement Conference.
Mr. Manuel Munoz, agreed to the same terms as to Co- Defendant: Rosalinda Munoz, parties signed the agreement as an attachment "A" to the original Judgment Pursuant to Stipulation, filed and entered in court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-01-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: CINDY LEE ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF JAMES MEYERS, WHO IS PRESENT.
J.R. GABBARD, LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY FOR DEFT. ROSALINDA MUNOZ, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE NOT SETTLED. PARTIES COULD ONLY REACH A PARTIAL SETTLEMENT. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

JPT ANDREW WESTLEY. CLERK S. VAN TREE, NOT REPORTED. (218)
